prompt: The record field mutation fails to compile. What is the bug?
choices: Record accessor methods are called with parentheses: p.x() not p.x
Record components are implicitly final; you cannot assign to p.x; create a new record instance instead: p = new Point(10, p.y())
Records must implement Cloneable to allow field modification
final fields can be modified with reflection using setAccessible(true)
explanation: Record components are final — they are set in the constructor and never changed. p.x = 10 is a compile error. Records are inherently immutable data carriers. Fix: create a new instance: Point updated = new Point(10, p.y()).
